title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!
